use_cases: Primary action triggers for forms and confirmations
Destructive action buttons with visual warning states
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and controls
Loading state indicators for async operations
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-style button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (sm, default, lg, xl, icon). Features Radix UI's asChild pattern for slot composition, loading state support, and left/right icon slots. Designed for universal use across SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce platforms as a core UI building block.
